(1) इन िनयम! को क ीय शासिनक अिधकरण (समूह 'ख' और 'ग' कण+ पद) भत- (संशोधन) िनयम, 2017 कहा जायेगा । (2) ये राजप5 म उनके काशन क तारीख को वृ ह!गे । 2. क ीय शासिनक अिधकरण (समूह 'ख' और 'ग' कण+ पद) भत- िनयम, 2015 म, अनुसूची म, सहायक के पद के संबं; म, कॉलम (6) म “20 वष+ और 27 वष+ के बीच” आने वाले श>द! एवं अंक! के ?थान पर “20 वष+ और 30 वष+ के बीच” श>द और अंक ित?थािपत कए जाएंगे । [फा. सं. ए-12011/2/2011-ए.टी] Cीिनवास कतीकथला, संयु सिचव टपणी टपणी टपणी टपणी :::: धान अिधसूचना दनांक 30 अैल, 2015 क सा.का.िन. 358 (अ) के तहत भारत के राजप5 म कािशत क गयी थी । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th October, 2017 G.S.R. 1268(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 35 read with sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 13 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Group ‘B’ and ‘C’ Miscellaneous Posts) Recruitment Rules, 2015, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal (Group ‘B’ and ‘C’ Miscellaneous Posts) Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2017. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Central Administrative Tribunal (Group ‘B’ and ‘C’ Miscellaneous Posts) Recruitment Rules, 2015, in the Schedule, relating to the post of Assistant, in column (6), for the words and figures “Between 20 years and 27 years”, the words and figures “Between 20 years and 30 years” shall be substituted. [F. No. A-12011/2/2011-AT] SRINIVAS KATIKITHALA, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 358(E), dated the 30th April, 2015. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
